description: 业务与成本分析盘示例，覆盖会话量、Token、估算成本、客户与 Workspace 消耗。

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT diff[1] as today, diff[2] as yesterday, round((diff[3]-1.0)*100, 2) as growth FROM (SELECT compare(total_calls, 86400) as diff FROM (SELECT count(*) as total_calls FROM log))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT diff[1] as today, diff[2] as yesterday, round((diff[3]-1.0)*100, 2) as growth FROM (SELECT compare(total_calls, 86400) as diff FROM (SELECT count(*) as total_calls FROM log))

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT diff[1] as today, diff[2] as yesterday, round((diff[3]-1.0)*100, 2) as growth FROM (SELECT compare(total_tokens, 86400) as diff FROM (SELECT sum(llmTotalTokens) as total_tokens FROM log))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT diff[1] as today, diff[2] as yesterday, round((diff[3]-1.0)*100, 2) as growth FROM (SELECT compare(total_tokens, 86400) as diff FROM (SELECT sum(llmTotalTokens) as total_tokens FROM log))

display.markdownStr:
### 成本说明

- 成本按 `inputTokens / outputTokens / cachedTokens` 与当前价格表估算。
- 当前是估算成本，不是结算账单口径。

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) as t, CASE WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('sql_diagnosis', 'sql_generation') THEN 'sql' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('main', 'agent_main', 'sop', 'sop_recommend') THEN 'ops' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('intelligent_recommend') THEN 'recommend' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('spl_generation', 'spl_simple_qa', 'spl_intent_recognition', 'spl_diagnosis', 'promql') THEN 'query_language' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('trace-analysis', 'apm-analysis', 'logstore_analysis', 'alert-rule-analysis', 'log_cluster_result_analysis', 'metricset_abnormal_analysis', 'probe_diagnosis') THEN 'analysis' ELSE 'other' END as business_type, count(*) as session_count FROM log GROUP BY t, business_type ORDER BY t LIMIT 100000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) as t, CASE WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('sql_diagnosis', 'sql_generation') THEN 'sql' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('main', 'agent_main', 'sop', 'sop_recommend') THEN 'ops' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('intelligent_recommend') THEN 'recommend' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('spl_generation', 'spl_simple_qa', 'spl_intent_recognition', 'spl_diagnosis', 'promql') THEN 'query_language' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('trace-analysis', 'apm-analysis', 'logstore_analysis', 'alert-rule-analysis', 'log_cluster_result_analysis', 'metricset_abnormal_analysis', 'probe_diagnosis') THEN 'analysis' ELSE 'other' END as business_type, count(*) as session_count FROM log GROUP BY t, business_type ORDER BY t LIMIT 100000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) as t, CASE WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('sql_diagnosis', 'sql_generation') THEN 'sql' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('main', 'agent_main', 'sop', 'sop_recommend') THEN 'ops' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('intelligent_recommend') THEN 'recommend' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('spl_generation', 'spl_simple_qa', 'spl_intent_recognition', 'spl_diagnosis', 'promql') THEN 'query_language' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('trace-analysis', 'apm-analysis', 'logstore_analysis', 'alert-rule-analysis', 'log_cluster_result_analysis', 'metricset_abnormal_analysis', 'probe_diagnosis') THEN 'analysis' ELSE 'other' END as business_type, sum(llmTotalTokens) as total_tokens FROM log GROUP BY t, business_type ORDER BY t LIMIT 100000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) as t, CASE WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('sql_diagnosis', 'sql_generation') THEN 'sql' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('main', 'agent_main', 'sop', 'sop_recommend') THEN 'ops' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('intelligent_recommend') THEN 'recommend' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('spl_generation', 'spl_simple_qa', 'spl_intent_recognition', 'spl_diagnosis', 'promql') THEN 'query_language' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('trace-analysis', 'apm-analysis', 'logstore_analysis', 'alert-rule-analysis', 'log_cluster_result_analysis', 'metricset_abnormal_analysis', 'probe_diagnosis') THEN 'analysis' ELSE 'other' END as business_type, sum(llmTotalTokens) as total_tokens FROM log GROUP BY t, business_type ORDER BY t LIMIT 100000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) as t, CASE WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('sql_diagnosis', 'sql_generation') THEN 'sql' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('main', 'agent_main', 'sop', 'sop_recommend') THEN 'ops' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('intelligent_recommend') THEN 'recommend' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('spl_generation', 'spl_simple_qa', 'spl_intent_recognition', 'spl_diagnosis', 'promql') THEN 'query_language' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('trace-analysis', 'apm-analysis', 'logstore_analysis', 'alert-rule-analysis', 'log_cluster_result_analysis', 'metricset_abnormal_analysis', 'probe_diagnosis') THEN 'analysis' ELSE 'other' END as business_type, round(sum(coalesce(cast(inputTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 0.8 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.3 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 4.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 4.0 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0.8 / 1000000.0 END + coalesce(cast(outputTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 3.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.6 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 16.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 16.0 / 1000000.0 ELSE 3.0 / 1000000.0 END + coalesce(cast(cachedTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 0.08 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.03 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 0.4 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 0.4 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0.08 / 1000000.0 END), 2) as estimated_cost FROM log GROUP BY t, business_type ORDER BY t LIMIT 100000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) as t, CASE WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('sql_diagnosis', 'sql_generation') THEN 'sql' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('main', 'agent_main', 'sop', 'sop_recommend') THEN 'ops' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('intelligent_recommend') THEN 'recommend' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('spl_generation', 'spl_simple_qa', 'spl_intent_recognition', 'spl_diagnosis', 'promql') THEN 'query_language' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('trace-analysis', 'apm-analysis', 'logstore_analysis', 'alert-rule-analysis', 'log_cluster_result_analysis', 'metricset_abnormal_analysis', 'probe_diagnosis') THEN 'analysis' ELSE 'other' END as business_type, round(sum(coalesce(cast(inputTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 0.8 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.3 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 4.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 4.0 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0.8 / 1000000.0 END + coalesce(cast(outputTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 3.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.6 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 16.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 16.0 / 1000000.0 ELSE 3.0 / 1000000.0 END + coalesce(cast(cachedTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 0.08 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.03 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 0.4 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 0.4 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0.08 / 1000000.0 END), 2) as estimated_cost FROM log GROUP BY t, business_type ORDER BY t LIMIT 100000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT ownerId, user_list.gc, user_list.cid_name, sum(totalTokens) as total_tokens, count(distinct threadId) as thread_count FROM log l JOIN (SELECT userid, arbitrary(gc) AS gc, arbitrary(cid_name) AS cid_name FROM user_list GROUP BY userid) as user_list ON cast(l.ownerId as bigint) = cast(user_list.userid as bigint) GROUP BY ownerId, user_list.gc, user_list.cid_name ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 10
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT ownerId, user_list.gc, user_list.cid_name, sum(totalTokens) as total_tokens, count(distinct threadId) as thread_count FROM log l JOIN (SELECT userid, arbitrary(gc) AS gc, arbitrary(cid_name) AS cid_name FROM user_list GROUP BY userid) as user_list ON cast(l.ownerId as bigint) = cast(user_list.userid as bigint) GROUP BY ownerId, user_list.gc, user_list.cid_name ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 10

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT ownerId, user_list.gc, user_list.cid_name, round(sum(coalesce(cast(inputTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 0.8 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.3 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 4.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 4.0 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0.8 / 1000000.0 END + coalesce(cast(outputTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 3.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.6 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 16.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 16.0 / 1000000.0 ELSE 3.0 / 1000000.0 END + coalesce(cast(cachedTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 0.08 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.03 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 0.4 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 0.4 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0.08 / 1000000.0 END), 2) as estimated_cost, count(distinct threadId) as thread_count FROM log l JOIN (SELECT userid, arbitrary(gc) AS gc, arbitrary(cid_name) AS cid_name FROM user_list GROUP BY userid) as user_list ON cast(l.ownerId as bigint) = cast(user_list.userid as bigint) GROUP BY ownerId, user_list.gc, user_list.cid_name ORDER BY estimated_cost DESC LIMIT 10
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT ownerId, user_list.gc, user_list.cid_name, round(sum(coalesce(cast(inputTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 0.8 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.3 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 4.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 4.0 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0.8 / 1000000.0 END + coalesce(cast(outputTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 3.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.6 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 16.0 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 16.0 / 1000000.0 ELSE 3.0 / 1000000.0 END + coalesce(cast(cachedTokens as double), 0) * CASE model WHEN 'qwen3.5-plus' THEN 0.08 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-flash' THEN 0.03 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen3-coder-plus' THEN 0.4 / 1000000.0 WHEN 'qwen-plus' THEN 0.4 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0.08 / 1000000.0 END), 2) as estimated_cost, count(distinct threadId) as thread_count FROM log l JOIN (SELECT userid, arbitrary(gc) AS gc, arbitrary(cid_name) AS cid_name FROM user_list GROUP BY userid) as user_list ON cast(l.ownerId as bigint) = cast(user_list.userid as bigint) GROUP BY ownerId, user_list.gc, user_list.cid_name ORDER BY estimated_cost DESC LIMIT 10

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT CASE WHEN workspace IS NULL OR workspace = '' THEN '(empty)' ELSE workspace END as workspace_name, count(*) as total_sessions, count_if(status <> 'completed' OR (error IS NOT NULL AND error <> 'null')) as failed_sessions, sum(totalTokens) as total_tokens, sum(llmCalls) as total_llm_calls, sum(toolCalls) as total_tool_calls FROM log GROUP BY workspace_name ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 20
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT CASE WHEN workspace IS NULL OR workspace = '' THEN '(empty)' ELSE workspace END as workspace_name, count(*) as total_sessions, count_if(status <> 'completed' OR (error IS NOT NULL AND error <> 'null')) as failed_sessions, sum(totalTokens) as total_tokens, sum(llmCalls) as total_llm_calls, sum(toolCalls) as total_tool_calls FROM log GROUP BY workspace_name ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 20
